title: Resolved hostel WiFi login issue
description: Students were unable to authenticate to the hostel WiFi after a router restart.
resolutionText: Students were asked to forget the network, renew DHCP, and reconnect after the access point restart.

title: Resolved water supply outage in hostel block
description: The hostel block lost water supply because the overhead pump tripped overnight.
resolutionText: The maintenance team reset the pump and restored supply after checking the tank line.

title: Resolved online fee receipt delay
description: The fee portal showed payment success but the receipt was not generated until finance reconciliation completed.
resolutionText: Finance confirmed the transaction, refreshed the ledger, and issued the receipt after reconciliation.
